feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: An Atmosphere on the Ultra-Short Period super-Earth HD 3167 b
entry.content:
Authors: ..., C Smith, M Zhang, EMR Kempton,JL Bean... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: 'Lava worlds'-Earth-sized planets hot enough (Teq >~ 1100 K) to melt their dayside silicate surfaces-have emerged as promising candidates for atmospheric detection and characterization. Thermal emission observations show an apparent dichotomy ...

Alert: JL bean (keyword alert)

entry.title: Carbon Cycle Imbalances on Arid Terrestrial Planets with Implications for Venus
entry.content:
Authors: HT White-Gianella, J Krissansen-Totton - The Planetary Science Journal, 2026

Abstract: ... Thus, a terrestrial planet in the HZ needs the right atmospheric composition and albedo to ... Liquid water might exist on a terrestrial planet with a 100 bar CO 2 atmosphere and 450 K surface, ... -like life , which is approximately −20 ∘ C (−253 K) ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: (~biosignature|life|alien|organic) (Mars|Venus ... (keyword alert)

entry.title: The Self-Information Theory of Life.

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: CH HUANG, JF CHEN, JZ Tsien - Chinese Journal of Biochemistry & Molecular ..., 2026

Abstract: The origin of life and its organizing principles represent a long-standing, scientific hard problem. Because information, together with matter and energy, form the three cornerstones of our knowledge system and even the universe, we ask whether life ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Potential Utilization of Pseudocereals and Their By-Products in Food and Non-Food Industries

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: D DÜLGER ALTINER, E Aydın, G Yıldız

Journal: 2026

Abstract: ... Thanks to their high fiber content, they are also recognized as effective prebiotic foods. These attributes make pseudocereals promising candidates for addressing a range of health challenges, including obesity, osteoporosis, cardiovascular diseases ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Formulation and Quality Evaluation of Probiotic-Enriched Dairy and Non-Dairy Food Products

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: Z Tiger - International Journal of Research in Multidisciplinary ..., 2026

Abstract: The rising interest in functional foods has prompted significant research into the development of probiotic-enriched food products, both dairy and non-dairy. This study investigates the formulation, sensory attributes, and microbiological stability of ...

entry.title: From random pools to precision tools: The expanding repertoire of synthetic nucleic acid catalysts

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: CPM Scheitl, C Höbartner - Current Opinion in Chemical Biology, 2026

Abstract: ... Beyond applications in nucleic acid research and diagnostics, the study of nucleic acid catalysts offers fundamental insights into the origin of life and the RNA world hypothesis. This review covers both fundamental and applied perspectives and ...

entry.title: The Phase Transition from Nothing to Something: From Primordial Soup to Particle Zoo in Four Parameters

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: B Jia

Journal: 2026

Abstract: We investigate whether particle-like entities defined as persistent, localized, propagating, and interaction-capable subgraph structures can emerge spontaneously in a minimal dynamical system with no predefined geometry. We ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Variance-dependent inheritance fidelity drives residence-time symmetry breaking in a protocell model

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: MJ Carr - BioSystems, 2026

Abstract: Symmetry breaking in prebiotic and protocellular systems is often attributed to fitness gradients, catalytic amplification, or explicit selective advantages. The present study tests whether direction-neutral, state-dependent variance coupling can generate ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Squid cartilage-derived chondroitin sulfate from Uroteuthis chinensis: a novel marine prebiotic modulating gut microbiota and ameliorating ulcerative colitis

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: S Chen, H Li, R Chen, Z Liang, Z Ou, P Zhang, L Ni... - Food Research International, 2026

Abstract: This study evaluated the prebiotic potential of chondroitin sulfate (CS) derived from the cartilage of the squid Uroteuthis chinensis, and its protective effects against dextran sulfate sodium (DSS)-induced ulcerative colitis (UC) in mice. Dietary ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

Alert: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ... (keyword alert)

entry.title: Emergence of Statistical Financial Factors by a Diffusion Process
entry.content:
Authors: J Negrete Jr, JJ Ramos -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.12197, 2026

Abstract: Factor models characterize the joint behavior of large sets of financial assets through a smaller number of underlying drivers. We develop a network-based framework in which factors emerge naturally from the structure of interactions among ...

Tags: Cosmology

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Generalized symmetries and emergence in axion effective field theories
entry.content:
Authors: D Sehayek, N Craig -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.11877, 2026

Abstract: ... We show that emergence constraints are universally saturated by anomaly inflow onto topological defects, while in perturbative UV ... phenomenological implications of the emergence constraints. To do so, we will first explore the way in which ...

Tags: Cosmology
